resolution: Fixed - Root cause was test environment using incorrect build ID causing cache issues and old code execution. Fixed by implementing direct file reading for build ID in test environment and correcting PowerShell script to properly trim build ID values.
title: Admin UI Non-Functional in Test Environment - System Status Loading Loop
description: Admin UI completely non-functional in test environment. System status remains stuck in loading state indefinitely, and all Database Management functionality is completely broken and inaccessible. This affects core administrative operations and prevents proper system management.

user_report.original_report: Admin UI not updating in test environment. Continues to show System status as loading and other Database Management is completely non-functional

root_cause_potential: Frontend-backend connectivity issues in test environment
Missing or misconfigured API endpoints for system status
Database connection failures in test environment
Broken WebSocket/SSE connections for real-time updates
Test environment database not properly initialized
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Investigate test environment connectivity, verify API endpoints are responding, check database connections, and ensure proper test environment configuration

immediate_fixes.action: Verify test environment API connectivity and endpoints
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure backend services are accessible from Admin UI in test environment

immediate_fixes.action: Check test environment database connections and initialization
immediate_fixes.rationale: Verify database is properly configured and accessible in test environment
Ensure WebSocket/SSE connections are working for live status updates

immediate_fixes.action: Review test environment deployment and configuration
immediate_fixes.rationale: Identify environment-specific issues causing UI failures

impact_assessment.user_impact: Critical - Admin UI completely unusable in test environment
impact_assessment.urgency: High - Prevents testing and validation workflows
